title: Sour Crisp Polish Lettuce Grill
description: A quick sour and crisp grilled lettuce dish with a tangy glaze, perfect for a low-carb lunch.
instructions: Wash and dry the gem lettuce, then cut it into bite‑size wedges.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, apple cider vinegar, honey, minced garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Place the lettuce wedges on a preheated grill set to medium heat.
Brush the glaze generously over both sides of each lettuce wedge.
Grill the wedges for 3 minutes on each side, until they are slightly charred and crispy.
While the lettuce is grilling, keep an eye on the grill temperature to avoid flare‑ups.
Remove the lettuce from the grill and scatter the chopped dill over the hot wedges.
Serve immediately, optionally adding a light squeeze of lemon juice for extra brightness.
